sections.paragraph:
Original: חמיטל חמוּטל

Transliteration: chămûṭal chămı̂yṭal

Phonetic: kham-oo-tal'

BDB Definition:

Hamutal = "father-in-law is protection"
  1. one of the wives of Josiah, daughter of Jeremiah of Libnah, mother of Jehoahaz and Zedekiah

Origin: from H2524 and H2919

TWOT entry: None

Part(s) of speech: Proper Name Feminine
